title: Hintivan II

'''Hintivan II''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|cold]], heavily [[Forest/Legends|forested]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] that occupied the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="AIR" /> in the [[Hintivan system/Legends|Hintivan system]], a part of the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="NewTerritories" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to large [[Tree/Legends|trees]].<ref name="AIR" />

During the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="CSWE" /> which began in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Hintivan II was controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CSWE" /> An Imperial-sanctioned company that utilized [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] labor carried out [[Logger|logging]] operations there, handing out early-model suits of Imperial [[Snowtrooper armor/Legends|snowtrooper armor]] to its workers to protect them from the low temperatures and hazardous conditions of their work.<ref name="AIR" /> At some point by 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', which establishes that [[Talas Piran]] bought his freedom from [[Slavery/Legends|enslavement]] at least two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to its setting and became enslaved at least two years prior to that, represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one year before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> [[Slaver/Legends|enslavers]] sold the [[Locan]] [[Talas Piran]] from<ref name="AIR" /> the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC Loce">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Loce system/Legends|Loce system]]</ref> celestial body [[Loce]] to the company on Hintivan II. There, Piran and his work gang were forced to cut down trees utilizing only [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-axes]]. After long years of work,<ref name="AIR" /> at one point by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> the Locan managed to buy his freedom and ultimately became an off-world enslaver himself.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hintivan II was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Hintivan [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Hintivan II, in grid square Q-3.<ref name="TEA" />
